task_completion.description: Verify that a nature image is opened in GIMP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIMP application window is open, and a photograph of nature (e.g., landscape, plants, wildlife) is visible in the main image canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Hue-Saturation tool is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hue-Saturation' dialog box is open and visible on the screen, typically accessed via the Colors menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the saturation value is increased in the tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Hue-Saturation dialog, the 'Saturation' slider is moved to the right, displaying a positive value greater than 0.

task_completion.description: Verify that the image colors appear more vibrant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nature image in the canvas preview shows noticeably more intense, vivid, and saturated colors compared to the original image in earlier screenshots.

task_completion.description: Verify that the changes are applied to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'OK' button on the Hue-Saturation dialog is clicked, or the dialog is closed and the canvas retains the enhanced, saturated colors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GIMP GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse clicks or GUI navigation within the GIMP application, not terminal windows running ImageMagick or similar CLI image editing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual GIMP software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GIMP interface elements (toolbox, layers dialog, menu bar) should be visible, confirming it is not a mock interface or a different program.

integrity.description: Verify the image was actually edited during the trajectory, not just swapped.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the intermediate step of the Hue-Saturation dialog being open with the slider adjusted, rather than just opening an already-edited vibrant image.
